verses.text: Ahi zongin Ananias a kici pasal khat leh a zi Sapfira a kici, nupa kop khat om uh hi. A neihsa uh pawlkhat zuak uh a
ahi zongin a zi tawh thukimin a sumte pawlkhat im-in, a dangteng sawltakte kiangah a va ap hi
Peter in, “Ananias aw, bang hangin Satan' thu-in gamta a, na lo zuak man sumte pawlkhat kem simin, Kha Siangtho khem na hi hiam

Tua lo na zuakma-in nangma-a' hi a, na zuakkhit ciangin a sum zong nangma-a' mah ahi hi. Tua hinapi-in bang hangin tua bangin gamtat ding ngaihsun peuhmah na hi hiam? Mite a khem hiloin Pasian a khem na hi hi,” a ci hi
Ananias in hih thu a zak phetin thakhatin si-in puksukpah a, hih thu a za mi khempeuh a lau mahmah uh hi
Tua ciangin tangvalte hong kipanin puan tawh a luang tun uh a, puakhia-in a va vui uh hi
Tua khit nai thum bang ding ciangin a zi hong pai a, ahi zongin tua lai-a thupiang bangmah theilo hi
Peter in tuanu kiangah, “Nang leh na pasal in na lo zuak man uh sum pen a vekpi-in hih zah mah ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” ci-in a dong hi. Amah in, “Hi hi, tua zah mah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi

Tua ciangin Peter in tuanu kiangah, “Bang dingin na nupa-un Topa' Kha Siangtho ze-et ding thukim khawm na hi uh hiam? En in, na pasal a vuite kongkhak gei mahmahah om uh a, nang zong hong puakhia ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Amah zong thakhat thu-in si-in Peter khe kiangah a puksuk hi. Tua ciangin tangvalte hong lut uh a, a sih khitlam a muh uh ciangin puakhia-in a pasal' gei-ah a phum uh hi
Pawlpi mi khempeuh leh hih thu a za mi khempeuhte nakpi takin a lau uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Lim leh Na Lamdang Tampi Kibawl

verses.text: Sawltakte in mite lakah lim leh na lamdang tampi a bawl uh hi. Thu um mi khempeuh Solomon' Talap-ah kikhawmin a om uh hi
Midangte in thupi sa-in hoihsa mahmah uh a, ahi zongin amaute pawlpih taktak ngamlo uh hi
Topa' thu a um numei pasal tampi tak hong kibehlaplap uh hi
Hih bangin sawltakte' nasepna hangin kongzingah cinate hong kipua a, Peter hong pai ciangin a liim in cinate a liahkhak theihna ding deihin a lupna leh a lupna pheekte uh tawh lam gei-ah a koih uh hi
Jerusalem khua kiima om khuapite panin mite hong pai-in, cinate leh dawivei mite hong paipih uh a, a vekpi-in damna a ngah uh hi.
Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa leh amah tawh a kipawl tua lai-a Saddusi mite in sawltakte haza-in thangpai uh ahih manin thu bawl ding a ngaihsun uh hi
Tua ahih manin sawltakte manin thong sungah a khum uh hi
Ahi zongin tua zanin Topa' vantung mi khat in thong kongkhakte hong a, sawltakte a paikhiatpih khit ciangin amaute kiangah
“Biakinn-ah pai un la, hih nuntak thakna thu mite kiangah va gen un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi

Ama gen mah bangin sawltakte zong zingsang ciangin biakinn-ah pai-in thuhilh ding a kipan uh hi. Siampi lianpenpa leh ama kikholhpihte in ulian kikhopna a cingtaakkhat a omtheihna dingin Jew mi upa khempeuh a kikhopna dingun a sam uh hi. Tua khit ciangin thong panin sawltakte va kai-in uliante mai-ah a hong paipihna dingun palikte a sawl uh hi
Ahi zongin thongah palikte a va tun' uh ciangin sawltakte na om lo hi. Tua ahih manin uliante kiangah kileh kikin

“Thongah ka tun' uh ciangin a kongkhakte limtak mahin tawh kikalh a, thongcingte in zong kongpi-ah limtak mahin a na cing ka mu uh hi. Ahi zongin thong kong ka hon' uh ciangin a sungah kuamah na omlo hi,” ci-in a zasak uh hi
Biakinn ukpa leh siampi liante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hih sawltakte a bangci thu hi ding hiam, ci-in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi
Tua laitakin mi khat hong pai-in amaute kiangah, “Thong sungah na khum uh mite in tu mahmahin biakinn sungah thuhilhin om uh hi,” ci-in a hong gen hi
Tua ciangin biakinn ukpa leh a mite va pai-in sawltakte hong paipih kik uh hi. Mihonte in suang tawh amaute a den'gawp khakding lau uh ahih manin sawltakte ngongbawl loin thudam tawh a paipih uh hi
Tua ciangin uliante mai-ah sawltakte dingsak uh a, siampi lianpenpa in sawltakte kiangah thu genin

“Hih mipa' min tawh thu na hilh nawnlohna dingun khauhtakin thu kong pia uh hi. Tu-in na gamtatnasate uh thei un. Jerusalem khuasung khempeuhah thu na genthang uh a, ama sihna pen kote nong ngawh nuam uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Peter leh sawltak dangte in, “Mite' thu sangin Pasian' thu ka mangzaw ding uh hi
Note in singlamteh tungah Jesuh khai-in na thah khit uh ciangin i pu i pate' Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak khinzo hi
Israel mite kisik kikin Pasian in a mawhna uh a maisak theihna dingin Ukpi leh Honpa-in tua Jesuh bawlin ama taklamah a tusak hi
Hih thute thei-in teci a pangte pen ko sawltakte bek hiloin Kha Siangtho tawh zong ka hi uh a, tua Kha Siangtho pen amah a um mite tungah Pasian in a khongin a piak ahi hi,” ci-in a dawngkik uh hi
Uliante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh ahih manin sawltakte thah dingin a ngaihsun uh hi
Ahi zongin amaute sung panin Farisi mi Gamaliel, Thukham hilh sia khat ahi, mi khempeuh in zong a zahtakbawl mipa khat hong ding a, tawlkhat sung sawltakte a kipusuahpihna dingin thu pia a
tua khit ciangin a lawm uliante kiangah, “Israel mite aw, hih mite na bawlna ding uh tawh kisai-in limtakin kidawm un

Tuma lam tawlkhat lai-in Thudas a kici mi khat hong khang hi. Mi lian khat ka hi hi, ci-in gen a, mihing za li ding bang in amah pawlpih uh hi. Ahi zongin amah kithatin, a nungzui khempeuh kithehthang a, ama vai beita hi

Hih thu a pian' khit ciangin, mi bangzah pha hiam, ci-in gamsung mi khempeuh a kisim laitakin Galilee mi Judas a kici mi khat hong khang leuleu a, amah in zong nungzui mihonpi mah a nei hi. Amah zong kithat leuleu a, a nungzuite kithehthangin maimang hi

Tu-in zong tua bangmahin thu hong piang leuleu hi. Note kiangah kong gennop thu in: Hih mite bangmah cih kei un la, hici omsak lel un. Mihingte' bawltawm vaihawmna ahih leh ama thu-in hong bei lel ding hi
Ahi zongin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahih leh na zo zo ngei kei ding uh hi. Pasian tawh a kido na hi ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi

Tua ahih manin uliante in Gamaliel' thugen a mang uh hi. Sawltakte samkik sak uh a, a sat khit uh ciangin Jesuh' min tawh thu a hilhkik ngeilohna dingun thu a pia uh hi. Tua khit ciangin sawltakte a khah uh hi
Uliante omna panin sawltakte paikhia uh a, Jesuh' hangin mindaina a thuak dingin Pasian in kilawm hong sa hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a lungdam mahmah uh hi
Nisimin biakinn sung leh mite inn-ah thu hilh uh a, Jesuh, Khrih hi, cih Lungdamna Thu a gengen uh hi.
